Description (cleaned): Counts sequences in FASTA or FASTQ files, or lines in other files, for all files in a directory matching a pattern.
Computes counts of reads, variants, samples, and replicates; updates a summary data frame.
Creates barplot of read counts per sample or replicate, optionally colored by sample type.
Creates histogram of read counts per variant, optionally colored by sample type.
Pools multiple datasets with the same marker; merges identical ASVs, preferring longest sequence for cluster centroid; supports mean or sum of read counts.
Pools replicates for each sample; read count per ASV can be mean, sum, max, or min across replicates.
Filters a feature (ASV, sample, replicate) across intermediate filter outputs, retaining only matching lines.
Summarizes each intermediate filtering step; groups by a variable, counting distinct values or total reads.
Pools unique ASV-ASV_ID pairs from input tables or CSVs; checks for conflicts; returns complete unique list.
Writes CSV with samples in columns, ASVs in rows, read counts in cells.
Clusters ASVs using Swarm or VSEARCH.
Plots cluster classifications (closed, open, hybrid) across clustering parameters; shows number of clusters per class.
Plots density of pairwise identities for ASVs clustered by swarm at multiple d values.
Plots density of pairwise identities for ASVs at multiple clustering identity thresholds.
Eliminates ASVs with fewer reads than a cutoff in the dataset.
Filters out chimeric sequences.
Removes ASVs with stop codons in all three frames on the direct strand.
Removes ASVs with higher read counts in negative controls than in samples.
Removes ASVs with length modulo 3 differing from majority.
Removes ASVs very similar to more abundant ASVs, based on max_mismatch and pcr_error_var_prop.
Removes occurrences not present in at least cutoff number of replicates per sample.
Removes occurrences with read counts below a cutoff.
Removes occurrences where read proportion within the sample-replicate is below cutoff.
Removes occurrences where read proportion within the ASV is below cutoff.
Pools filtered occurrence tables, keeping only occurrences passing all filters.
Removes replicates with Renkonen distances above cutoff to other replicates of the same sample.
Computes Renkonen distances between sample-replicate pairs.
Generates known_occurrences, missing_occurrences, and performance_metrics for mock and control samples.
Generates ASV-specific read count cutoff values.
Barplot of Renkonen distances between sample-replicates; optionally colored by sample type.
Density plot of Renkonen distances between sample-replicates.
Suggests PCR-error filter parameter (pcr_error_var_prop) based on mock ASV comparisons.
Suggests optimal parameters for read count and variant filters.
Suggests occurrence proportion cutoff to retain all expected ASVs in mock replicates.
Checks input file formats and basic info.
Downloads and extracts files from OSF.
Downloads and extracts files from Zenodo.
Identifies expected ASVs in mock samples.
Demultiplexes FASTA reads using tag combinations and trims primers.
Reads FASTA files and dereplicates sequences.
Merges forward/reverse FASTQ reads into FASTA; can compress output; generates `fastainfo.csv`.
Randomly subsamples sequences from FASTA files to standardize read counts across libraries.
Trims primers from FASTA files
Assigns taxonomy to ASVs using BLAST-based Lowest Taxonomic Group (LTG) method.
Assigns taxonomy to 16S sequences using the RDP classifier.
